Package org.eventb.core.tests.pom

Class ProofSerializationTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pom.ProofSerializationTests
public class ProofSerializationTests extends BuilderTest
Class containing unit tests to test the proper serialization and deserialization of proof trees.

    specializedFactoryClosedProof()
    Ensures that a closed proof tree using a specialized factory is correctly serialized and deserialized.
    final void
    test()
     
    void
    testAbstractManualRewrites_Bug717()
    Ensures that a rule produced by a manual rewriter in Rodin 2.8 can be retrieved.
    void
    testAbstrExpr_Bug3370087()
     
    void
    testAbstrExpr_WD_Bug3370087()

    testContrapInHyp_Bug3370087()

    void
    testFwdInfReasonerRewrites_Bug717()
    Ensures that a rule produced by the reasoner exF in Rodin 2.8 can be retrieved.
    final void
    testPartialInstantiation()
    Ensures that a proof tree containing a partial instantiation can be serialized and deserialized.
    void
    testReasonerStorageCompatibility()
     
    void
    testReasonerVersionCurrent()
     
    void
    testReasonerVersionOld()
    Checks that a proof serialized with an old reasoner version is deserialized with its old version retained in the proof skeleton, changing the confidence to UNCERTAIN.
    void
    testUnknownReasoner()
    Ensures that a proof that references an unknown reasoner is rebuilt with UNCERTAIN confidence.
